issues.details: summary.total_blocks claims 18 but the blocks array contains 21 entries. summary.from_block_collection claims 12 but 14 blocks have source='block-collection'. summary.custom_blocks claims 5 but 7 blocks have source='custom'. The summary.blocks_by_priority correctly lists all 21 blocks (contradicting the stated total of 18). These counts were not updated when modal, table, and icon-grid were added late.
issues.remediation: Update summary.total_blocks to 21, from_block_collection to 14 (or verify exact count), custom_blocks to 7. Consider a post-generation consistency check.

issues.details: sample-scrape.json identifies 'product-detail (custom)' (confidence: medium) for the api-chemical-product archetype (c-biocatalyst-single-page: description, specifications, sidebar nav, inquiry form). The block-inventory has no dedicated product-detail block and the summary.key_decisions section does not explicitly address how this archetype's unique composite layout will be assembled. The archetype is served by sidebar + table + hubspot-form, but there is no explicit documentation of the composition strategy.
issues.remediation: Add a key_decision entry documenting that api-chemical-product pages use a Sidebar section style + Table + Columns + HubSpot Form composition, explicitly superseding the sample-scrape's product-detail candidate.

issues.details: The key_decisions entry states 'Icon grid is a Cards variant, not a separate block', and the icon-grid content_model notes 'Rather than a dedicated block, use the Cards block with a variant class cards (icon)'. However, icon-grid appears as its own named block entry in the blocks array, and the cards block has no 'icon' variant defined in its variants array. This creates ambiguity for block developers.
issues.remediation: Either: (a) remove the standalone icon-grid block entry and add an 'icon' variant to the cards block, OR (b) keep icon-grid as an explicitly named thin wrapper of cards and document this in the cards block's variants.

issues.details: sample-scrape.json identifies 'section (parallax-image)' as a distinct pattern (c-map-parallax: background image with parallax effect + CTA overlay). The section_styles inventory has 'full-width-image' which covers static background images, but there is no mention of parallax CSS behavior or how this effect will be handled in EDS.
issues.remediation: Add a note to the full-width-image section style (or a new parallax-image section style entry) documenting how the parallax scroll effect will be approximated in EDS (e.g., CSS scroll-behavior, IntersectionObserver enhancement, or accepted as dropped behavior).

issues.criterion: testimonial carousel behavior not addressed in quote block
issues.details: sample-scrape.json flags 'testimonial (custom)' as a carousel. The inventory maps this to the 'quote' block (Block Collection), which handles individual quotes but not a carousel of testimonials. No variant or note addresses the carousel wrapper.
issues.remediation: Add a 'quote (carousel)' variant to the quote block, or document that the Carousel block wraps multiple quote blocks to replicate the testimonials carousel.

evidence.check: block-inventory.json exists and is well-formed JSON
evidence.finding: File exists (51916 bytes), parses as valid JSON object with 13 top-level keys including 'blocks' (array of 21 entries), 'summary', 'block_collection_available', 'block_party_matches', 'section_styles' (5 entries), 'default_content_patterns' (4 entries).

evidence.check: All 7 required fields present on every block
evidence.finding: All 21 blocks verified to have: name, description, variants, content_model, source_pattern, archetype_usage, complexity, priority. Zero missing fields.

19/21 candidates clearly covered. Two gaps: product-detail not explicitly documented as composite; parallax-image section style not differentiated from full-width-image. Cards covers 5 variants (default/news/resource/event/related). Section patterns (cta, full-width-image) covered by section_styles. Animated-intro covered by default_content_patterns.
evidence.notes: medium issue raised for product-detail, low issue for parallax-image

evidence.finding: hero: critical, cards: critical, columns: critical, hubspot-form: critical. All four high-volume patterns are correctly prioritized. content-filter (serves 2330+ listing pages across events/news/knowledge) also correctly marked critical.

14 blocks have source='block-collection' with block_collection_url pointing to main--aem-block-collection--adobe.aem.live. 2 blocks (breadcrumbs, content-filter) additionally have Block Party references with GitHub URLs. Custom blocks (hubspot-form, stats, profile, content-filter, sidebar, contact-locations, icon-grid) are marked source='custom'.
evidence.notes: block_collection_reference field is null on all blocks but block_collection_url field carries the actual URLs — minor schema inconsistency

evidence.check: Custom blocks are justified (not duplicating Block Collection)
evidence.finding: hubspot-form: justified (Block Collection Form is deprecated per key_decisions). stats: justified (animated counter, no BC equivalent). profile: justified (no BC equivalent for person bios). content-filter: justified (custom JS for query-index filtering). sidebar: justified (navigation sidebar not in BC). contact-locations: justified (unique 2-col contact+offices layout, low priority). icon-grid: description says 'Can be implemented as Cards variant' — listed as custom block but content_model defers to Cards (icon). Low-severity contradiction logged.

content-filter has: 3 variants (events/news/knowledge), content_model with configuration-table structure (source row + filter field rows), explicit notes on query-index.json reading, client-side filtering, pagination, URL-based filter state for shareability. Block Party Content Filter Hub (https://github.com/rusmeenkhan1/content-filter-hub) cited as reference implementation. Complexity=complex, priority=critical. Architecture is well-defined.

summary: PASS — block-inventory.json is well-formed, all 21 blocks carry all 7 required fields, high-volume patterns are critical priority, content-filter has a clear architecture plan, and Block Collection URLs are referenced. Minor issues: summary count metadata is stale (claims 18 blocks, actual 21); product-detail composite strategy is undocumented; icon-grid contradicts its own key_decision; parallax-image section style is undifferentiated.
